title: SPUQ Baseline Implementation + CSD Classifier with Task-Normalized Features
summary: Demo notebook comparing CSD (Critical Slowing Down) indicators vs SPUQ (paraphrase-based uncertainty) for detecting LLM capability boundaries. Loads pre-computed CSD features for 108 data points across 5 model-task pairs (arithmetic and graph coloring), applies 4 normalization strategies (z-score, relative difficulty, percentile-rank, delta features), trains LogReg/RF/SVM classifiers with LOPO/LOTO/LOMO cross-validation, and visualizes results. Reproduces the key finding: CSD with z-score normalization + relative difficulty achieves LOPO F1=0.949 at zero extra API cost.
